title: crepidium pleistanthum
intro: Crepidium pleistanthum, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crepidium pleistanthum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
